title: Agent Feature Flags Schema
description: Standard schema for dynamic agent feature flags. Agent fleets poll a single URL to discover which tools and capabilities are currently enabled, at what rollout percentage, and under what kill-switch conditions. No code deploys needed to toggle agent behaviour.

tool_name.description: Name of the tool or capability this flag controls. Agents match against this value.

enabled.description: Global on/off switch. When false, the tool is disabled for all agents regardless of rollout.

rollout_percentage.description: Percentage of agent instances that should see this flag as enabled. 0 = off for all, 100 = on for all.

kill_switch_condition.description: Regex pattern. When matched against the agent's current context (e.g., model name, environment, error rate), the flag is forced to disabled. Example: 'gpt-4|o1-preview' would disable the flag for agents running those models.

generated_at.description: When this flag set was generated. Agents should cache and re-fetch after this.

ttl_seconds.description: Recommended cache TTL. Agents should not use flags older than this.

metadata.reason: Waiting on AP2 mandate spec ratification
